name: mohani-monorepo
description: 데모 통합 실행 스크립트 — 인프라/백엔드/에이전트/Electron 한 번에

scripts.infra:reset: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait
scripts.dev: npm run infra:up && concurrently -k --kill-others-on-fail -n agent,backend,electron -c blue,magenta,cyan "npm:dev:agent" "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:electron"
scripts.test: cd backend && gradlew.bat test && cd ../agent && npm test
scripts.install:all: cd agent && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
